name: After Dinner Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 5 oz of the Mint Wafers in a double boiler, stirring constantly or microwave on medium for about 3 minutes. Set aside.
2. Cream butter with sugar and egg. Add salt.
3. Mix in melted chocolate.
4. Gradually add flour.
5. Chill dough at least 1 hour.
6. Shape dough into balls using 1 level tablespoon for each cookie.
7. Roll balls into walnuts.
8. Place cookies on greased baking sheets.
9. Flatten slightly with the palm of your hand.
10. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and place a mint wafer on top of each cookie, pressing slightly.
12. Continue baking until the cookie is firm.
Makes 3 dozen.
